title: EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: FOUR RIVERS EARLY LEARNING AND PARENTING EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers collaborative programs and systems for kindergarten readiness, as well as community events, children's playgroups, and classes for parents and guardians of young children. 400 E Scenic Drive Suite 207 The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Ages 0-5 children and their parent or guardian Hours: Varies Email (541) 993-2396 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program contact (541) 993-2396 Director Shira Skybinskyy [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, Wasco, and Wheeler Counties Services: Children's Play Groups Community Calendars * Parenting Issues Parenting Skills Classes School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - DOLLY PARTON'S IMAGINATION LIBRARY MUTUAL SUPPORT - PARENTING RESOURCES AND SUPPORT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
